task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully satisfied. The diff includes: (1) RenameRequest struct with properly json-tagged Source and Destination fields in api/types.go; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go that POSTs to /api/rename; (3) RenameHandler in server/routes.go with proper error handling returning 404 (StatusNotFound) for missing source and 409 (StatusConflict) for existing destination; (4) RenameModel function in server/images.go that copies then deletes the source; (5) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler); (6) CLI command 'rename SOURCE DEST' with cobra.ExactArgs(2); (7) CLI RenameHandler that correctly calls client.Rename; (8) No existing test files modified, all changes are additive. Implementation is complete and correct.
